svg.text: DocWright chrome — always controlled by the shell
Plugin-owned — View Container takes full control when active

g.text: Brand, +New, AI picker, right-panel toggle. Always visible.
The sole source of truth for active view. After refactor: all
One per registered view. Active state: left accent border.
Position set by "order" in plugin.json manifest.
When plugin active: full-height, no DocWright chrome.
Label + optional actions (e.g. +). Present in native views.
Absent when plugin owns the panel — plugin provides its own.
File tree, git panel, plugin tree. Populated by mountSidebar().
When plugin active: fully plugin-owned — no native tabs.
Native: Properties / Related / Review / Improve tabs.
Plugin: plain header label replaces the tab bar entirely.
Native: frontmatter fields, related docs, AI output.
Attribution + theme picker. After refactor: Settings link
added here (removes Settings from Activity Bar).
Fixed above footer. Opens AI chat panel at bottom of Main.
Always visible. DocWright chrome — plugins don't control it.
